description: Set up a pipeline using the php Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get -qq update, installs git and unzip, downloads Composer via curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/composer https://getcomposer.org/composer.phar, makes it executable, and runs composer install --prefer-dist -n -q. Add a test stage job named test that executes ./vendor/bin/phpunit, and a parallel job test:5 that uses the php:5 image and also runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit. Add a phpcs job in the test stage that allows failure, runs an echo, then downloads PHP_CodeSniffer via curl -OL https://squizlabs.github.io/PHP_CodeSniffer/phpcs.phar and runs php phpcs.phar --standard=psr2 src/. Add a deploy stage job insight that uses the tutum/curl image, runs only on the master branch, runs an echo then posts analysis data to the SensioLabs Insight API with curl -X POST -H "Accept: application/vnd.com.sensiolabs.insight+xml" "https://$INSIGHT_USER:$INSIGHT_TOKEN@insight.sensiolabs.com/api/projects/$INSIGHT_PROJECT/analyses". Add a deploy stage job packagist that also uses tutum/curl, runs only on tags, runs an echo then triggers a Packagist update via curl -XPOST -H'content-type:application/json' "https://packagist.org/api/update-package?username=b17&apiToken=$PACKAGIST_API_TOKEN" -d'{"repository":{"url":"https://gitlab.com/vnphp/media-extension-bundle"}}'.
